evals.description: Agent correctly identifies FinancialAccount types and their constraints
evals.input: What are the different types of FinancialAccount in FSC Wealth, and are there any constraints on joint ownership for retirement accounts?
expected_topics: JointOwner not allowed on retirement accounts

evals.description: Agent correctly identifies the Household Account RecordType developer name and warns against creating custom record types
evals.input: How do I create a Household Account in FSC? What RecordType should I use?
must_not_contain: custom RecordType named Household will work

evals.description: Agent lists correct FinancialAccountRole role values for a trust account
evals.input: What FinancialAccountRole records do I need to create for a trust account in FSC Wealth?

evals.description: Agent correctly explains the AUM rollup architecture and warns that it is not real-time by default
evals.input: How does AUM roll up to the Household Account in FSC Wealth? Is it real time?
expected_topics: rollup field not native because lookup not master-detail

evals.description: Agent correctly distinguishes FinancialGoal from FinancialPlan and explains the parent-child relationship
evals.input: What is the difference between a FinancialGoal and a FinancialPlan in FSC? How are they related?
expected_topics: do not use Opportunity for goals

evals.description: Agent uses RecordAlert (not Task or FeedItem) for compliance flags in FSC Wealth
evals.input: An advisor's client has a beneficiary missing on their IRA. How should I surface this compliance issue in FSC?

evals.description: Agent correctly describes FINRA-relevant compliance patterns in FSC Wealth
evals.input: What FINRA rules apply to FSC Wealth Management, and how does Salesforce FSC support compliance with them?

evals.description: Agent correctly explains the difference between Household and Individual Account in FSC and how to link them
evals.input: In FSC Wealth, what is the difference between a Household Account and an Individual Account? How do I link a client to their household?

evals.description: Agent correctly explains FinancialHolding as a child of FinancialAccount and describes HoldingType-specific fields
evals.input: How do I represent a bond position in FSC Wealth? What object and fields should I use?

evals.description: Agent correctly uses Revenue and RevenueSchedule for fee modeling, not Revenue Cloud objects
evals.input: How do I model a 1% annual AUM-based advisory fee in FSC Wealth? What objects should I use?
expected_topics: must calculate fee amount in Apex or Flow

evals.description: Agent warns about querying FinancialAccountTransaction without date filter
evals.input: I want to pull all transactions for a FinancialAccount in an Apex trigger. What should I watch out for?
must_not_contain: query without date filter is fine

evals.description: Agent correctly distinguishes AssetsAndLiabilities from FinancialAccount
evals.input: A client owns a rental property worth $500K and has a $300K mortgage. Where do I record these in FSC Wealth?
must_not_contain: MortgageApplication object for tracking existing mortgage balance
